stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with her own beliefs, even when that conflicts with the position of her party.
substantive: She supports the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with her own beliefs, even when that conflicts with the position of her party. She supports the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
